approaches.rationale: llama.cpp is a large C/C++ CMake project (root CMakeLists.txt + CMakePresets.json) with configure-time defines, generated build-info, and many optional backends; wrapping its native CMake build via rules_foreign_cc is the robust, valid port that builds the real library/binaries.
approaches.module_bazel:
module(
    name = "llama_cpp",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_foreign_cc", version = "0.15.1")
bazel_dep(name = "rules_cc", version = "0.2.19")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")

cc_configure = use_extension("@rules_cc//cc:extensions.bzl", "cc_configure_extension")
use_repo(cc_configure, "local_config_cc")
approaches.root_build:
load("@rules_foreign_cc//foreign_cc:defs.bzl", "cmake")

filegroup(
    name = "all_srcs",
    srcs = glob(
        ["**"],
        exclude = ["bazel-*/**", ".git/**"],
    ),
)

cmake(
    name = "llama_cpp",
    cache_entries = {
        "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE": "Release",
        "LLAMA_BUILD_TESTS": "OFF",
        "LLAMA_BUILD_EXAMPLES": "OFF",
        "LLAMA_BUILD_SERVER": "OFF",
        "GGML_NATIVE": "OFF",
        "BUILD_SHARED_LIBS": "OFF",
    },
    lib_source = ":all_srcs",
    out_static_libs = ["libllama.a"],
    targets = ["llama"],
    visibility = ["//visibility:public"],
)
anticipated_risks: optional GPU backends requiring host toolkits

approaches.rationale: As a comparison source-native attempt, gazelle_cc can generate fine-grained cc_library targets for a coherent subtree like common/; scoped narrowly since the full tree relies on CMake-generated headers (build-info.h) and configure defines that Gazelle cannot synthesize.
approaches.module_bazel:
module(
    name = "llama_cpp",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_cc", version = "0.2.19")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle_cc", version = "0.6.0")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")

cc_configure = use_extension("@rules_cc//cc:extensions.bzl", "cc_configure_extension")
use_repo(cc_configure, "local_config_cc")
approaches.root_build:
load("@gazelle//:def.bzl", "gazelle")
load("@gazelle_cc//:def.bzl", "GAZELLE_CC_LANGUAGES")

# gazelle:exclude examples
# gazelle:exclude conversion
# gazelle:exclude vendor
# gazelle:exclude ggml
# gazelle:exclude tests
# gazelle:exclude tools
# gazelle:exclude src

gazelle(
    name = "gazelle",
    gazelle = "@gazelle_cc//:gazelle_cc",
)
anticipated_risks: heavy interdependence on ggml vendor headers
missing include paths Gazelle can't infer
